AC: Skill under skills/ that: (1) documents Samba/VFAT-safe rename rules with ':' sanitized; (2) gathers candidate names from cue/spec + musicology provider data; (3) resolves conflicts via most-common then least-verbose; (4) picks genre-appropriate conventions (collections / classical / pop-rock); (5) produces a rename plan for dirs and files. Agent can apply the skill when asked to correct FLAC directory names.

Body.raw: create a skill that attempts to correct the naming of directory and its files to both be correct and to avoid characters / forms that do not conform to samba / vfat standard.  The sources of data will be contained cue and spec files, as well as results from musicology providers. If there are multiple conflicting answers, choose the most common one, or least verbose.  Recognize that collections and classical music and modern pop/rock all have different naming conventions and chose the name that most closely resembles the convetions.  But p0 requirement is the samba / vfat naming. notably ':' must be sanitized.

Summary.raw: make skill: Correct flac directory names from data

WorkItems.message:
Add correct-flac-names skill grounded in FLAC store and musicology.

Documents VFAT/Samba sanitization (esp. ':'), candidate sources (cue, SPECS,
.meta.* sidecars, metatool export-json), conflict rules, and genre naming
conventions. Paths: /mnt/sdb2/music/flac/files and ../bin/musicology.
WorkItems.summary: Survey FLAC tree + cue/spec/meta sources; draft skill outline

WorkItems.message:
Ship SKILL.md body for correct-flac-names (rules + workflow).

Covers P0 sanitize table, gather/resolve/rename loop, shadup _tags refresh,
and pointers into musicology + shadup sanitize helpers.
WorkItems.summary: Write skills/.../SKILL.md with VFAT/Samba rules, conflict resolution, genre conventions

WorkItems.message:
Ground examples.md in live store paths: Verve colon offender and Roxy Music Avalon usenet rip.

Adds cue/SPECS/.meta path reference table; notes Avalon siblings and optional track cleanup. SKILL.md calls out dotted scene dirnames under conflict rules and pop/rock convention.
WorkItems.summary: Add examples + reference for cue/spec/meta paths under /mnt/sdb2/music/flac/files

WorkItems.message:
Prefer sidecar order: combined, johan, online providers, then txt/cue.

SKILL.md and examples.md now walk .meta.*.json in that priority; Avalon wins
from combined, Verve from johan. Cue/SPECS no longer outrank filled higher tiers.
WorkItems.summary: Prefer meta source order: combined, johan, online providers, then txt/cue

WorkItems.message:
Document Pixies dirname experiment: bare vs The vs , The for musicscan.

Discogs matches only Pixies - Doolittle; MusicBrainz and Last.fm match all three
and canonicalize to Pixies. Prefer bare artist in rename skill.
WorkItems.summary: Document The-artist dirname experiment (Pixies) for musicscan providers

WorkItems.message:
Document Pogues dirname experiment alongside Pixies.

All three forms (Pogues / The Pogues / Pogues, The) match MB, Discogs, and
Last.fm and canonicalize to The Pogues — unlike Pixies where Discogs rejects
The / , The. Skill now prefers canonical provider spelling, not blind bare-The.
WorkItems.summary: Document Pogues The-artist dirname experiment alongside Pixies

WorkItems.message:
Clarify VA only for true collections; Pixies/Pogues as canonical rename targets.

Bare/The/,The variants must converge (Pixies - Doolittle; The Pogues - Rum…).
VA reserved for multi-artist comps; main artist + collaborators stay under Artist - Album.
WorkItems.summary: Clarify VA only for true collections; Pixies/Pogues as canonical rename targets
Example: Pogues best-ofs — strip misplaced VA
